content: If we reframe the 2025 ICM's intrinsic curiosity reward for novel state discovery as an implicit entropy regularization term directly integrated into the maximum entropy RL objective derivation, we can eliminate the need to hand-tune separate extrinsic-intrinsic reward weightings. This integration naturally encourages autonomous agents to seek high-reward target states while retaining structured exploration of unknown environments without requiring ad-hoc intrinsic reward scaling.
